visual_organic_quality.notes: Organic material helper nodes, bevel helper, coral/orange socket material, and warm ATP guide lighting are established. Full anatomical visual quality remains pending.

biology_accuracy.notes: Only root rig and whole-cell context socket were created; no unsupported decorative organelle anatomy was added.

animation_functionality.notes: Mitochondrion_RootRig is present as the transform parent for future animation-ready anatomy.

roblox_export_readiness.notes: Phase 1 geometry is lightweight. Later phases must manage cristae mesh density, transparent material behavior, and modifier application before Roblox export.

whole_cell_integration.notes: WholeCell_ContextSocket exists as the integration/scale anchor under the root rig.

notes_on_changed: Replaced stub with Blender scene setup, render settings, world background, cameras, and lighting.
Added shared organic material helper and rounded finishing helper inside build_mitochondrion.py.
Created only Mitochondrion_RootRig and WholeCell_ContextSocket from the manifest, plus non-manifest review aids.
Did not build OuterMembrane, InnerMembrane_Cristae, Matrix_Volume, ATP_SignalSites, Stress_CueLayer, or Interaction_Hotspots in Phase 1.
roblox_export_risks: Future cristae folds can become too dense if not retopologized or generated with export budgets.
Procedural node materials and bump effects need baking or simplified Roblox material equivalents.
Transparency on the context/socket and future membranes must be tested in Roblox render order.
Modifiers should be applied or intentionally preserved before FBX export depending on the import pipeline.
next_recommended_phase: Phase 2: build the layered OuterMembrane and Matrix_Volume as rounded, asymmetric, coral/orange biological forms under Mitochondrion_RootRig while preserving the WholeCell_ContextSocket integration anchor.
